violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. - Sink was purchased, but plumber has not installed the sink yet.
Food service manager certification. — --Person in charge * did not hold an approved food service manager certificate.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
